MINI MINUTES:
APPEARANCES VIA ZOOM VIDEOCONFERENCE:
Elliot J. Conn, Esq. (415.417.2780; elliot@connlawpc.com) of Conn Law, PC for Plaintiff.
Michael Foley, Esq. (310.768.3068; michael.foley@bowmanandbrooke.com) of Bowman and Brooke LLP for Defendant.

A R G U E D. (as fully reported in the reporter's notes/transcript) The Court having reviewed the pleadings and having heard oral argument rules as follows:

PLAINTIFF GAETANO BASSO'S Motion To Enforce Settlement is ordered off calendar. If parties are not able to resolve this afternoon, they are to meet and confer, file a joint written report for this matter to be re-set.

Judge: Richard B. Ulmer Jr., Clerk: S. Le, Court Reporter: Maria Torreano, CSR#8600, maria.torreano@gmail.com, Reported. =(302/RBU)
